home.heroSubtitle: We stand by your side to legally combat cyber abuse. You are not alone.
home.formConfidential: The information you provide will be kept strictly confidential.

fields.name: Full Name
fields.localBodyPlaceholder: Enter the name of your local body
fields.policeStationPlaceholder: Enter the name of your nearest police station
fields.victimSocialLinkPlaceholder: Enter your Facebook / Instagram profile link
fields.accusedSocialLink: Profile Link of the Opposing Party (If available)
fields.evidenceDesc: Allowed files: JPG, PNG, PDF, MP4, WEBM (Max 50MB per file)
fields.consent: I hereby certify that the information provided is true, and I consent to its use solely for the purpose of receiving legal advice.

home.submitSuccess: Your request has been submitted successfully. Our representative will contact you shortly.
home.submitError: A technical issue occurred while submitting. Please try again.
home.trustBadge: Fully Secure · Highly Confidential · Expert Legal Advice

about.pageSubtitle: A platform ensuring free and expert legal advice for victims of cyber abuse.

mission.label: Our Mission
mission.title: Making Cyberspace Safe for Everyone.
mission.body: 'Oppam' aims to ensure legal protection for those who are overwhelmed by online abuse. With the help of modern technology and expert lawyers, we are here to listen to you and support you through legal avenues.
mission.footer: Legal Protection, Social Commitment, Utmost Confidentiality

privacy.title: Data Privacy & Security
privacy.body: The information and evidence you share will be completely secure. Your requests will be handled with the utmost confidentiality.

partners.label: Our Network
partners.title: Moving Forward Together
partners.body: A dedicated collective comprising social workers, cyber experts, and lawyers is working together for you.

contact.title: Need More Information?
contact.body: You can contact our team directly for any queries.

proSono.title: Free Legal Advice
proSono.body: We provide legal advice without any fees to all eligible individuals.

admin.loginSubtitle: Access the Oppam Grievance Redressal Portal.
